creator: rgrimes@FreeBSD.org
text: Though this may be a broken hardware issue, to me it does make since to at least patch the man page in the section on DIAGNOSTICS watchdog timeout to indicate that this may be caused by non functional MSI interrupts and that one should try the dev.bge.%d.msi sysctl to disable them, with a further note on how to report that one had to do this so we might gather additional data.
